rule_text: A trader should select data frequency inversely proportional to acceptable statistical robustness tolerance and resource constraints—higher frequencies provide more trades and statistical confidence but require greater development investment; lower frequencies require less automation but generate fewer trades and weaker statistical validity.

exit_conditions: Trade count falls below 500 in any backtest period

The rules for the strategy
rule_text: Trade mean-reverting residuals from cointegrated pairs using rolling z-score thresholds derived from OLS regression, with optimization of the lookback window to balance statistical robustness and responsiveness.
entry_conditions: Rolling z-score of residuals exceeds ±2.0 standard deviations
OLS regression lookback window is 60 minutes (60-bar rolling regression)
Residuals time series confirmed mean-reverting via ADF test (p < 0.05)
exit_conditions: Z-score reverts to ±0.5 or crosses zero
Intraday stop-loss at z-score ±3.0
End of trading day close position
